mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post ( content, emotion, emotion_score, created_at, expires_at, like_count, repost_count, is_blurred, user_id, image_url ) VALUES ( #{content}, #{emotion}, #{emotionScore}, NOW(), #{expiresAt}, 0, 0, #{isBlurred}, #{userId}, #{imageUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM post WHERE expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC
